title: Recover Super Admin Principal ID Access - Frontend

requirements.summary: Add Super Admin recovery mechanism in AdminDashboardPage for principal 'fiawz-svdcq-fsplo-srina-bia3r-kdxu5-c4tcj-e7bkm-w3gex-cvpvm-2qe' to reinitialize access
acceptanceCriteria: The AdminDashboardPage displays a recovery button or automatic recovery flow when the authenticated principal matches the hardcoded Super Admin ID but lacks Super Admin permissions
Clicking the recovery mechanism calls a backend method to restore Super Admin role
After successful recovery, the user's role updates to Super Admin without requiring re-authentication
The recovery UI provides clear feedback on success or failure

file_operations.description: Add Super Admin recovery detection and UI flow. When the authenticated principal matches 'fiawz-svdcq-fsplo-srina-bia3r-kdxu5-c4tcj-e7bkm-w3gex-cvpvm-2qe' but getSuperAdminStatus indicates the Super Admin is not properly initialized or the current role is not Super Admin, display a recovery button. Wire the button to call the recoverSuperAdmin backend capability. Show loading state during recovery and success/error feedback messages. After successful recovery, invalidate the user role and permissions queries to refresh the dashboard state without requiring re-authentication.

Add React Query hooks for Super Admin recovery operations. Create useGetSuperAdminStatus hook to fetch SuperAdminStatus from the backend. Create useRecoverSuperAdmin mutation hook that calls the recoverSuperAdmin backend capability and invalidates relevant queries (user role, permissions, super admin status) on success. Ensure proper error handling and loading states for both hooks.
